Reviews & Social

FacebookInstagram

Customer Reviews

  • Jim E
    Google

    Great service at a good price and job well done. I will definitely recommend Joe to my friends and co-workers. New screen in 30 minutes.

  • Gracey S
    Google

    He did a quick and great job, my screen and battery were fixed in less than an hour, also very respectful! Thank you!

  • Andy P
    Google

    Joe was quick to respond and had a glass repair on my iphone done in 90min. He was very professional. His rates are good too. The quality of the glass replacement was excellent, and he said he would stand by his work. Will be recommending him for friends that need mobile phone repairs
